task_description: Add a dedicated side panel that acts as a Card Content Editor + Previewer. When exactly one card is selected on the canvas, the panel shows the card title and content for comfortable editing with a markdown preview. When no card or multiple cards are selected, the panel shows an empty state. Changes made in the panel immediately update the selected card on the canvas.

verification.summary: npm run build passes successfully. No test framework in the project. New CardEditorPanel component created and integrated into App.jsx. All acceptance criteria verified via code inspection.
